name: stingy-agents
description: Three scope-bounded subagents that let a skill or an Opus caller offload bulk or mechanical work to a cheaper, faster model: readonly-scanner (Haiku) for bulk file I/O and grep, skill-rewriter (Sonnet) for spec-driven edits to existing files, and code-generator (Sonnet) for spec-driven file creation. Spend Opus tokens on judgment calls, Haiku and Sonnet tokens on everything else.
